steps.title: Use the location note
steps.content: The student's goal is to indicate where the short story takes place. The relevant note is the one stating that "Raymond's Run" takes place in Harlem.

steps.title: Reject unrelated details
steps.content: Choice B identifies the author. Choice C identifies the book in which the story was published. Choice D identifies the narrative perspective. None of those state the setting. The answer is A.
